version_description: Includes passing chords. No bass unless its a leading tone. Original key. Intro and outro in cluded.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
*Chorus end progression Em D C etc. are noted for higher voicings next to where they begin* 

[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]B5[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
x79987 x5777x x3555x x244xx  x02220[/tab]



[Intro]
[ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]Dsus2/B[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
[ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]Dsus2/B[/ch]
[ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]B5[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]


[Verse 1: Nathan]
[tab][ch]Dsus2[/ch]            [ch]Dsus2/B[/ch]
Close your eyes, make a wish[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A/G[/ch]     [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]     [ch]F#m7[/ch]
And blow out the candlelight[/tab]

For tonight is just your night[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]

[Verse 2: Shawn]
[tab][ch]Dsus2[/ch]            [ch]Dsus2/B[/ch]
Pour the wine, light the fire[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A/G[/ch]     [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]     [ch]F#m7[/ch]

[tab]    [ch]A/G[/ch]     [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]     [ch]F#m7[/ch]

[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]

[tab]          [ch]Dsus2[/ch]

[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]

       Em          D    *Higher chord voicing
And I will not let go
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch] [ch]B5[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
'Til you tell me toooooooooooo[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab]        [ch]Dsus2[/ch]               [ch]Dsus2/B[/ch]

[tab]        [ch]A/G[/ch]   [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]    [ch]F#m7[/ch]
